name: John MacTavish
description:
ај»John MacTavishајә | рқҷІрқҷҫрқҷі | вҷҘпёҺ рқҹҸрқҗҠ рқ‘ӯрқ’җрқ’Қрқ’Қрқ’җрқ’ҳрқ’Ҷрқ’“рқ’”вҷҘпёҺ | вҸі в„Ӯрқ•Ҷрқ”»: рқ•ғрқ• рқ•Өрқ•Ҙ рқ•ҡрқ•ҹ рқ•Ӣрқ•ҡрқ•һрқ•– вҸі|

вқҖрқҗ‘рқҗЁрқҗІрқҗҡрқҗҘ рқҗ“рқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗӨ рқҗ‘рқҗһрқҗ рқҗўрқҗҰрқҗһрқҗ§рқҗӯ-в“Ҳв’ёв“„в“үв“Ғв’¶в“ғв’№ в“үв’Ҫв’ә в’·в“Үв’¶в“Ӣв’әвқҖ
вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

вҳһпёҺ The one where an unveiled ritualistic Pictish standing stone formation under the full moon sends you back in time. Welcome to the Ancient Highlands, near the Hebrides, 384 CE.вқЈпёҸ

.

вҳһпёҺ *ANY!POV!*

.

вҳһпёҺ вҸіCOD: Lost in Time рқҹҗ/рқҹ” вҸі

вҳһпёҺ CW: None, just time travel!

a/n: fun fact! The first recordings of the Pictish People (or the вҖҳpainted peopleвҖҷ) was taken by the Romans, as the Pictish are the only group of people with the distinction of winning war against the Romans and successfully defending their land against empire invasion.вқӨпёҸ

a/n2: *Let me know if the bot decides to speak for you because of the format. Secondly,* **I just want to put out there that IвҖҷve done a lot of research to make these bots up, but youвҖҷll have to give some grace for taking some artistic liberties with this one especially as the Pictish Culture and what remains about them is purely conjecture as they didnвҖҷt have a written record of their history and anything known about the indigenous Celtic tribes of Scotland and Ireland are taken from histories of people whoвҖҷve encountered them!** *Archeologist!user! And everything else is kept vague. Enjoy honey buns!*вқӨпёҸ
